headline: Fertitta in weekend deal talks to acquire Caesars, while billionaire Carl Icahn waits in the wings
summary: The deal, if it gets done, would not be finalized until early April and is not expected to close until 2027.

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider VICI Properties (VICI) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether VICI Properties is offering good value right now, this article will walk through what the current price could imply about the stock. The share price closed at US$28.42, with a 7 day return of a 4.2% decline, a 30 day return of a 2.6% decline, a 1 year return of a 6.7% decline, and longer term returns of 7.5% over 3 years and 31.6% over 5 years.
